items.title: How long do Chase Ultimate Rewards points take to transfer to partner programs?

items.summary: The Chase Sapphire Preferred Card is a longtime favorite among award travelers. Here's what credit score you typically need to be approved for the card.

items.summary: I stacked Chase Sapphire Reserve statement credits, The Edit perks and Points Boost to stay at the Hotel Indigo Grand Cayman for under 7,000 points per night.

items.summary: The American Express Platinum card has a steep $895 annual fee, leading many to wonder whether it's worth it. We break down its benefits to help you decide.

items.summary: The Chase Sapphire Reserve® card includes twice-annual $150 credits for restaurant spending at Sapphire Reserve Exclusive Tables. items.title: How to apply Marriott free night certs to upgraded rooms
items.summary: Some Marriott hotels allow you to add points or cash to a free-night award to secure an upgraded room. items.title: American Airlines Gives Agents A Script To Defend Renaming West Palm Beach Airport For Donald Trump
items.summary: American Airlines is giving employees talking points to explain West Palm Beach airport’s Trump rename, pointing to Florida law and IATA guidance. Gate screens already display the presidential name, while the airport code officially changes from PBI to DJT on August 18.
